name: teach-me
description: Learning coach skill. Explicitly invoked (do not auto-activate).
skillInstructions:
Kimi Code tool mapping for teach-me:

- teach-me is invoked explicitly by the user (e.g. /teach-me or $teach-me). Do NOT auto-invoke it from general requests to explain/teach/summarize.
- When teach-me asks to ask the user, present choices, or wait for input, use Kimi Code's AskUserQuestion tool (1 question, 2-4 options, recommended first). Do not render choices as plain text unless AskUserQuestion is unavailable.
- When teach-me refers to TodoWrite, use Kimi Code's TodoList tool.
- For read-only codebase exploration teach-me requests, use the Agent tool with subagent_type "explore".
- Use Kimi Code's Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Grep, Glob, WebSearch, and MCP tools by their exposed names for the corresponding actions.

interface.shortDescription: Turn work and reading into durable understanding
interface.longDescription: An explicitly-invoked learning coach: debrief recent work, learn a topic to observable understanding, with resumable checkpoints.
